Peptides, on the record.

Investor Overview · 2026

El Segundo, CA

Confidential 01

The peptide market has a
transparency problem.

  • No third-party batch testing as industry standard
  • Gray-market sourcing with unverified origins
  • Certificates of Analysis missing or fabricated
  • Zero enforceable quality control across the supply chain
"The gap between what's on the label and what's in the vial is the industry's open secret."
02

Research-grade. Every batch tested.
Every result published.

Certificate of Analysis

Third-party assay on every batch. Results published on-site before the lot ships.

Lot Traceability

Every vial tied to a batch number. Full chain-of-custody from synthesis to shipment.

RUO Compliance

Research-use-only posture with checkout attestation. Clean regulatory positioning.

03

8 launch SKUs across 3 categories.

Repair

BPC-157$89
TB-500$95
Recovery Stack$159

GH Axis

Ipamorelin$79
CJC-1295$89
GH Axis Stack$149

Longevity

NAD+$119
Glutathione$69

Retatrutide (flagship, $499 / 15 mg) launches Q2.

04

The South Bay athlete.

30–55, $250 k+ HHI. Strand runners. Huberman listeners.

$4.2B
TAM — US peptide market
$380M
SAM — direct-to-researcher
$12M
SOM — South Bay + digital (Y1)
05

DTC + subscription.

Average Order Value
$145
Subscription Rate Target
40%
Gross Margin Target
72%

Unit economics driven by in-house formulation and direct fulfillment. Subscription cohorts expected to reach 6-month LTV of $870.

06

Local first. 90-day launch arc.

Day 0

Quiet Launch

Founding-100 invites. Controlled onboarding, feedback loop.

Days 1–30

Local Partnerships

20 South Bay venues — gyms, clinics, biohacking spaces.

Days 30–60

Open + Referrals

Public storefront. Referral program. Earned media push.

Days 60–90

National Press

Tier-2 SKU launch. National press outreach. Paid acquisition.

Pre-launch budget: ~$7,000
